textByHash.6b7ef34edd4daac81639e737163d517b0ac73b78: Stop bothering me, can't you see I'm busy!
textByHash.16c397a63d88da4cf195e8f25bfc9d84cf739858: The other day I was drying my clothes on a line down by the shore. A storm hit and some of my clothing went missing.
textByHash.0ef0dd0eac371882277360f8de70bd817b7e2324: Just go look and leave me be! Search around the tower and you may find them.
textByHash.c118fa189055ca0ca0584491de66a8fdf42049dd: Rock, Paper, Scissors. Can't you tell?
textByHash.52de39287d5d429654f8d0dd18bd8ec05b9cee27: It's a draw at the moment. First it was best of three, then it was best of five.
textByHash.fea95496272c81663ed5078637eb61807d738209: Best of a hundred and one.
